# MockHub API — llms.txt
# Secondary concert ticket marketplace

> MockHub is a secondary ticket marketplace for concerts, sports, theater, comedy, and festivals.
> This file describes the public API for AI agents.

## Base URL
/api/v1

## Authentication
POST /api/v1/auth/login — JSON body: {"email", "password"} → {"accessToken", "expiresIn", "user"}
POST /api/v1/auth/register — JSON body: {"email", "password", "firstName", "lastName"} → {"accessToken", "expiresIn", "user"}
Authenticated requests: Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>

## Events (public, no auth required)
GET /api/v1/events — List events with search/filter/pagination
  Query params: q, category, tags, city, dateFrom, dateTo, minPrice, maxPrice, status, sort, page, size
  Returns: {"content": [EventSummary], "page", "size", "totalElements", "totalPages"}
GET /api/v1/events/featured — Featured events list
GET /api/v1/events/{slug} — Event detail by slug
GET /api/v1/events/{slug}/listings — Active ticket listings for an event
GET /api/v1/events/{slug}/sections — Section availability with pricing
GET /api/v1/events/{slug}/predicted-price — AI price prediction (requires AI profile)

## Venues (public)
GET /api/v1/venues — List all venues
GET /api/v1/venues/{slug} — Venue detail by slug

## Search (public)
GET /api/v1/search?q={query} — Full-text event search

## AI Features (public, requires AI provider profile)
POST /api/v1/chat — Chat with AI assistant. JSON body: {"message": "string"}
GET /api/v1/recommendations — AI-ranked event recommendations

## Cart (requires auth)
GET /api/v1/cart — Get current cart
POST /api/v1/cart/items — Add listing to cart. JSON body: {"listingId": number}
DELETE /api/v1/cart/items/{itemId} — Remove item from cart
DELETE /api/v1/cart — Clear cart

## Seller Listings (requires auth)
POST /api/v1/listings — Create a listing. JSON body: {"eventSlug", "sectionName", "rowLabel", "seatNumber", "price"}
GET /api/v1/my/listings — List seller's own listings. Query param: status (ACTIVE|SOLD|CANCELLED)
PUT /api/v1/listings/{id}/price — Update listing price. JSON body: {"price": number}
DELETE /api/v1/listings/{id} — Deactivate a listing (sets status CANCELLED, returns ticket to available)
GET /api/v1/my/earnings — Seller earnings summary with recent sales

## Checkout (requires auth)
POST /api/v1/orders/checkout — Create order from cart. JSON body: {"paymentMethod": "string"}

## Orders (requires auth)
GET /api/v1/orders — List user's orders (paginated)
GET /api/v1/orders/{orderNumber} — Order detail

## Ticket Download (requires auth)
GET /api/v1/orders/{orderNumber}/tickets/{ticketId}/download — Download ticket PDF with QR code

## Ticket Verification (public, no auth)
GET /api/v1/tickets/verify?token={jwt} — Verify ticket QR code token
  Returns: {"valid", "orderNumber", "ticketId", "eventSlug", "sectionName", "rowLabel", "seatNumber", "alreadyScanned", "scannedAt", "message"}

## Payments (requires auth except webhook)
POST /api/v1/payments/create-intent — Create payment intent. JSON body: {"orderNumber": "string"}
POST /api/v1/payments/confirm — Confirm payment. JSON body: {"paymentIntentId": "string"}
POST /api/v1/payments/webhook — Stripe webhook (no auth, signature verified)

## Error Format
All errors use RFC 9457 Problem Details:
{"type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"}

## Evaluation Conditions
MockHub implements evaluation conditions (sanity checks) on AI services and MCP tool actions.
Deterministic checks verify domain invariants (event in future, listing active, price plausible).
AI-as-judge checks verify response grounding (no fabricated events, prices, or dates).
Eval results are logged for observability. Critical eval failures may block agent actions.

## MCP Tools (requires API key: X-API-Key header)
MockHub exposes MCP tools for AI agents at /mcp/**:
- searchEvents(query, category, city, page, size) — search and filter events
- getEventDetail(slug) — full event details
- getEventListings(slug) — active listings for an event
- getFeaturedEvents() — curated featured events
- getListingDetail(listingId) — single listing by ID
- findTickets(query, category, city, dateFrom, dateTo, minPrice, maxPrice, section, maxResults) — compound search returning matching listings with event/date metadata
- getPriceHistory(eventSlug) — historical price snapshots
- getPricePrediction(eventSlug) — AI price forecast (requires AI provider)
- getCart(userEmail) — current cart contents
- addToCart(userEmail, listingId, agentId, mandateId) — add listing to cart for an autonomous agent action (eval-gated)
- removeFromCart(userEmail, itemId) — remove cart item
- clearCart(userEmail) — empty cart
- checkout(userEmail, paymentMethod, agentId, mandateId) — create order from cart for an autonomous agent action
- confirmOrder(userEmail, orderNumber, agentId, mandateId, paymentIntentId) — complete payment for a pending order; non-mock payments require a paymentIntentId
- getOrder(userEmail, orderNumber) — order details
- listOrders(userEmail, page, size) — order history
- createMandate(agentId, userEmail, scope, maxSpendPerTransaction, maxSpendTotal, allowedCategories, allowedEvents, expiresAt) — authorize agent actions
- revokeMandate(mandateId) — revoke agent authorization
- listMandates(userEmail) — list active mandates
- validateMandate(agentId, userEmail, scope, amount) — check if action is authorized

## ACP Endpoints (Agentic Commerce Protocol, requires API key: X-API-Key header)
ACP-compatible checkout endpoints at /acp/v1/:
POST /acp/v1/checkout — Create checkout. JSON body: {"buyerEmail", "lineItems": [{"listingId", "quantity"}], "agentId", "mandateId", "paymentMethod", "idempotencyKey"}
GET /acp/v1/checkout/{checkoutId} — Get checkout status. Header: X-Buyer-Email
PUT /acp/v1/checkout/{checkoutId} — Update checkout (PENDING only). JSON body: {"agentId", "mandateId", "addItems", "removeListingIds"}. Header: X-Buyer-Email
POST /acp/v1/checkout/{checkoutId}/complete — Complete checkout. JSON body: {"agentId", "mandateId", "paymentIntentId"}. Header: X-Buyer-Email
POST /acp/v1/checkout/{checkoutId}/cancel — Cancel checkout. JSON body: {"agentId", "mandateId"}. Header: X-Buyer-Email
GET /acp/v1/catalog — Browse product catalog. Query params: query, category, city, page, size
GET /acp/v1/listings — Browse actionable ticket offers. Query params: query, category, city, dateFrom, dateTo, minPrice, maxPrice, section, page, size

## Agent Mandates
Mandates define what an agent is authorized to do on behalf of a user.
Scope: BROWSE (read-only) or PURCHASE (can buy, subsumes BROWSE).
Limits: per-transaction max, cumulative total budget, category/event restrictions, expiration.
Autonomous purchase actions require both agent identity and mandate proof.
Managed via MCP MandateTools or directly via mandate service.

## Content Types
Request: application/json
Response: application/json
